title: Vector Index Comparison
description: Interactive p5.js panels showing how Flat, IVF, and HNSW vector indexes organize data for fast similarity search, with a comparison table covering speed, accuracy, memory, and build time.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Compare how Flat, IVF, and HNSW vector indexes trade search speed against accuracy and memory.
